retry_reason: A put operation never fails and retrying would cause a double-put (use-after-free).
contract_summary: Put wrapper for sk_buff: decrements the reference count of the socket buffer via kfree_skb, freeing the object if the count reaches zero. The caller must not access the skb after calling this function, as ownership is released unconditionally. No return value to check; the operation is always safe (kfree_skb handles NULL pointers as a no-op). This function is the BPF-accessible interface for releasing an sk_buff reference.

judge.reason: The function simply calls kfree_skb(skb), which is a reference-count decrement (put) on the sk_buff. No other logic is present.
